default_priority.description: The default priority for new tasks

sort_by.description: Sort tasks by id, priority, due-date, or title

show_closed.description: Whether to show closed tasks in the list by default

frame_style.description: The style of the frames (round, double, single)

due_color_enabled.description: Whether to color the due date based on how close it is

tag_sort_order.description: Sort tags: none, alphabetical, reverse-alphabetical, length, reverse-length
